title: Network Server Management

server_startup: Register event listeners: GameOverEvent, WorldLoadEvent, Trigger.update, PlayEvent
Schedule periodic save: netServer.admins.forceSave() + Core.settings.forceSave() every 60s
On ServerLoadEvent: start serverInput thread (reads stdin), print 'Server loaded'
player_connection_flow: net.handleServer(Connect.class): fire ConnectionEvent → check isIPBanned/isSubnetBanned → if banned: con.kick(KickReason.banned)
[Guard] if Steam address → override uuid from address
[Check] strict mode: duplicate name → kick(nameInUse); duplicate uuid/usid → kick(idInUse)
Player.create(); assign admin status, con, name, locale, color
player_disconnect_flow: net.handleServer(Disconnect.class): if con.player != null → onDisconnect(player, reason)
onDisconnect: if !hasDisconnected && hasConnected → Events.fire(PlayerLeave), Call.sendMessage('[player] has disconnected'), Call.playerDisconnect(id)
server_command_processing: stdin thread reads line → Core.app.post(() → handleCommandString(line))
ban <type> <target> → admins.banPlayerID/banPlayerIP/banPlayer, kick all newly-banned players
admin add/remove <name/id> → admins.adminPlayer/unAdminPlayer, update player.admin flag
admin_action_enforcement: trace → admins.getInfo(uuid), build TraceInfo, Call.traceInfo(player.con, other, info)
client_snapshot_processing: clientSnapshot(player, snapshotID, unitID, dead, x, y, ...) [unreliable from client]:
if snapshotID < con.lastReceivedClientSnapshot → return (out of order)
If player.isBuilder(): for each build plan → admins.allowAction(breakBlock/placeBlock):
if not allowed → Call.removeQueueBlock(player.con, ...), add to rejectedRequests
If !dead: unit.controlWeapons, aim, mineTile, move/trns with max-speed cap
if verifyPosition && dist > correctDist → Call.setPosition(player.con, newx, newy)
world_sync_broadcast: if state.isGame() && net.server(): handle PvP auto-pause, call sync()
writeBlockSnapshots() → for each synced building: build.writeSync → Call.blockSnapshot(sent, bytes)
periodic: healthSyncTime → Call.buildHealthUpdate for changed buildings
periodic: planPreviewSyncTime → sync client build plan previews between players
chat_message_flow: Anti-spam filter: if resetTime>0 && timeSince(lastMessageTime) < resetTime → suppress, increment messageInfractions
Duplicate message filter: same message within 10s → suppress
/a command: send only to admins (requires player.admin)
votekick_flow: Create VoteSession(target), session.vote(player, 1), reset cooldown, currentlyKicking = session
Validate not already voted, not self, not different team
autosave_flow: find auto_ saves, delete oldest if >= autosaveAmount

key_relationships: ServerControl implements ApplicationListener, holds CommandHandler handler
NetServer implements ApplicationListener, holds Administration admins, CommandHandler clientCommands
Administration holds: bannedIPs, whitelist, chatFilters, actionFilters, subnetBans, dosBlacklist, kickedIPs, bannedNames, playerInfo(ObjectMap<String,PlayerInfo>)
NetConnection (con) is field on Player; holds uuid, usid, address, kicked, hasConnected flags
Administration.Config: inner static class with all server config values
Administration.PlayerInfo: persistent per-player data (banned, admin, lastKicked, ips, names, etc.)
Administration.PlayerAction: poolable action object used by actionFilters
ChatFilter, ActionFilter: functional interfaces registered into Administration
conditions_and_guards: mod incompatibility → kick with detail message
clientSnapshot: snapshotID out of order → discard
clientSnapshot: verifyPosition && dist > correctDist → teleport correct
autoPause: no players → pause; players join → unpause
important_notes: NetServer registers all packet handlers in constructor (Connect, Disconnect, ConnectPacket)
connectConfirm is @Remote called from client AFTER world data is received
sendWorldData uses Deflater compression; world serialized via NetworkIO.writeWorld
Administration.forceSave() persists to Core.settings JSON; called by scheduled timer every 60s
VoteSession uses threshold: 2 votes, or 3 if >4 players; 5-min cooldown per voter
clientSnapshot is unreliable UDP, ordered by snapshotID; position correction via Call.setPosition
sync() sends block snapshots + entity snapshots every snapshotInterval (default 200ms)
ServerControl.gameOverListener selects next map via maps.getNextMap(lastMode, currentMap)
Socket input (TCP) mirrors stdin command handling via toggleSocket()
Config values: antiSpam, strict, whitelist, enableVotekick, motd, autosave, autoPause, roundExtraTime, packetSpamLimit, chatSpamLimit
